question: Which Brazilian state had the most orders?
ground_truth: SP (São Paulo) had the most orders

question: What was the most common payment method?
ground_truth: Credit card was the most common payment method

question: Which product category had the most orders?
ground_truth: bed_bath_table or housewares category had the most orders

question: What was the average review score?
ground_truth: The average review score was approximately 4.0 out of 5

question: Which state had the most delayed deliveries?
ground_truth: SP (São Paulo) had the most delayed deliveries in absolute count, followed by RJ (Rio de Janeiro)

question: What was the average order value?
ground_truth: The average order value was approximately R$120-160

question: How many orders were delivered successfully?
ground_truth: Approximately 96-97% of orders (around 96,478 out of 99,441 total) were delivered successfully

question: Which city had the most customers?
ground_truth: São Paulo had the most customers

question: What percentage of orders were paid in installments?
ground_truth: Approximately 66.9% of credit card orders used more than one installment, with an average of 3.5 installments per credit card transaction

question: Which product category had the lowest review scores?
ground_truth: Security and services or office furniture categories had lower scores

question: What was the average delivery time in days?
ground_truth: The average delivery time was approximately 12.1 days from order purchase to customer delivery, with a median of 10 days

question: What percentage of orders were delivered late (after the estimated delivery date)?
ground_truth: Approximately 6.8% of delivered orders arrived after the estimated delivery date

question: What was the average freight cost per order?
ground_truth: The average freight cost was approximately R$19.99 per order item

question: Which states had the highest average freight costs?
ground_truth: Northern and northeastern states had the highest freight costs — RR (Roraima) averaged R$42.98, PB (Paraíba) R$42.72, RO (Rondônia) R$41.07, AC (Acre) R$40.07, and PI (Piauí) R$39.15

question: What percentage of freight cost makes up the total payment on average?
ground_truth: Freight costs represented approximately 21.3% of the total order payment value on average

question: How many unique sellers were active on the platform?
ground_truth: There were 3,095 unique sellers active on the Olist platform

question: Which state had the most sellers?
ground_truth: SP (São Paulo) had the most sellers with 1,849, followed by PR (Paraná) with 349 and MG (Minas Gerais) with 244

question: What was the average revenue per seller?
ground_truth: The average revenue per seller was approximately R$4,391.48, while the top seller earned approximately R$229,472.63

question: What percentage of sellers shipped orders late (past the shipping limit date)?
ground_truth: Approximately 9.4% of order items were shipped by sellers after the shipping limit date

question: What was the average number of orders per seller?
ground_truth: Each seller fulfilled an average of approximately 36.4 orders, with the top seller fulfilling 2,033 orders

question: Which month had the highest revenue?
ground_truth: November 2017 (Black Friday month) had the highest revenue at approximately R$1,010,271

question: What was the total freight cost paid across all orders?
ground_truth: The total freight cost across all orders was approximately R$2,251,909

question: How many orders were cancelled?
ground_truth: 625 orders were cancelled, representing less than 1% of all 99,441 orders

question: What was the average product weight?
ground_truth: The average product weight was approximately 2,276.5 grams (about 2.3 kg), with the heaviest single product weighing 40,425 grams

question: Which product category had the heaviest average weight?
ground_truth: Office furniture (moveis_escritorio) had the heaviest average weight at approximately 11,390 grams, followed by bedroom furniture (moveis_quarto) at 9,989 grams

question: How many unique products were listed on the platform?
ground_truth: There were 32,951 unique products listed across all categories on the Olist platform

question: What was the average product price?
ground_truth: The average product price was approximately R$120.65

question: Which months in 2018 showed the highest order volume?
ground_truth: April and May 2018 showed the highest revenue months in 2018 at approximately R$996,647 and R$996,517 respectively

question: What proportion of total orders were in a non-delivered status?
ground_truth: Approximately 3.5% of orders were in non-delivered statuses: 1,107 shipped, 625 cancelled, 609 unavailable, and 314 invoiced out of 99,441 total orders

question: Which seller state had the worst on-time shipping performance?
ground_truth: States with fewer sellers and longer distances from logistics hubs, such as northern and northeastern states, generally had worse on-time shipping performance
